page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.medium is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.m2 server family. It is configured with 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs, meaning hyperthreading is not utilized, resulting in a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. The instance features 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-CPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that the compute resources are not shared with other tenants, offering consistent processing capabilities.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.m2.medium is structured for memory-intensive workloads that do not require massive parallel processing or GPU acceleration. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring a larger memory footprint relative to compute power, such as medium-sized databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.medium is an x86_64 virtual machine instance within the ecs.m2 family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-CPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring external storage solutions. This hardware profile makes the ecs.m2.medium qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-optimized workloads that demand dedicated CPU resources but do not require local disk space or graphics processing. It is suited for workloads such as caching layers, in-memory databases, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.medium is a memory-optimized KVM virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 virtual instance featuring a high memory-to-CPU ratio for memory-intensive workloads without local storage requirements.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
